pattern: Dynamic programming over which ring position holds each key character, accumulating minimal circular rotation plus press cost across the keyword.
hints: Rotating between two ring positions costs the smaller of the clockwise and anticlockwise distances on the circle.
Track, for each character of the key, the minimum total steps assuming the ring is aligned at each candidate position that matches that character.
Process the key left to right; for every position matching the current key character, take the best previous matching position plus its rotation distance, and add one press per character at the end.

edge_inputs.description: duplicate target characters favor the nearer occurrence
repeated single character requires only presses
choosing the wrong copy increases total rotation
key longer than ring with repeats

stress.description: random small-alphabet rings and keys drawn from the ring's characters so the key is always spellable
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    alpha = 'abcde'
    rlen = rng.randrange(1, max(2, size) + 1)
    ring = ''.join(rng.choice(alpha) for _ in range(rlen))
    present = list(set(ring))
    klen = rng.randrange(1, max(2, size) + 1)
    key = ''.join(rng.choice(present) for _ in range(klen))
    return [ring, key]
stress.note: key chars are restricted to characters present in ring
